meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Stop Abandoning Projects: Master User Onboarding for Students
content.seo_description: Break the cycle of unfinished projects. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of user-focused momentum. By implementing a structured onboarding flow, you force yourself to define the 'Aha!' moment. This creates a clear roadmap, prevents scope creep, and ensures your project delivers immediate value, keeping your motivation high until the final deployment.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial spark of an idea, the feverish late-night coding session, and then—the silence. Your GitHub repository sits at 40% completion, a graveyard of half-baked features and abandoned dreams. The cycle of starting but never finishing is the single greatest obstacle between you and a career in engineering.

The secret isn't more willpower; it's better architecture. By prioritizing user onboarding first, you anchor your project to a concrete outcome. Instead of building endless features, you build a journey. This shift in focus transforms your development process from a chaotic exploration into a disciplined execution of value.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides value to the user to avoid feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea and define a 3-step 'Aha!' onboarding sequence that delivers immediate value. Focus on minimizing user friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Draft an onboarding user flow document based on the requirements.'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Create a robust state tracker to manage user progress through the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean TypeScript state machine for a 3-step onboarding flow. Include types for 'onboarding_complete' and 'current_step'.

steps.title: Implement Progressive Disclosure
steps.description: Hide complex UI elements until the user has completed the initial onboarding steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Higher-Order Component (HOC) that gates main dashboard access behind the onboarding state machine.

steps.title: Integrate User Progress Persistence
steps.description: Ensure users can return to their onboarding flow without losing progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a persistence layer using localStorage to save onboarding progress and resume state on refresh.

steps.title: Finalize the Value Loop
steps.description: Create a trigger that prompts the user to perform the core app action after the final onboarding step.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a 'Call to Action' component that triggers automatically once the user finishes the onboarding sequence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add final completion trigger and redirect logic to the main app dashboard.'

pro_tips: Always build the onboarding flow before the database schema; it clarifies exactly what data you actually need.
Use 'Empty States' as placeholders for unbuilt features to keep the UI feeling polished while you iterate.
Keep onboarding under 60 seconds; if it takes longer, you are building a tutorial, not a product.
Measure the drop-off rate between onboarding steps to identify where your UX becomes confusing.
Use mock data during the onboarding phase to test the flow without needing a backend environment.
content.next_steps: After completing your onboarding flow, deploy the current version to Vercel or Netlify to get a live URL. Use this link to gather feedback from three peers and iterate based on their initial reaction.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student who starts projects—you are an engineer who ships them. Apply these patterns to your next build and watch your completion rate skyrocket. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
